nodes.name: 撒哈拉沙漠
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉沙漠是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括鸵鸟、白臉樹鴨、Black guinea fowl等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 马拉维湖
nodes.summary: 马拉维湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黑頂林鶯、Grey-capped social weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黑頂林鶯
nodes.summary: 黑頂林鶯（Eurasian blackcap，学名 Sylvia atricapilla），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 东非
nodes.summary: 东非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括Eastern crested guinea fowl、Dusky turtle dove、Quail-plover等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 西非
nodes.summary: 西非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括白腹珍珠雞、绿冠蕉鹃、Black-throated coucal等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The wintering areas overlap with the breeding range, but also include extensive areas in West Africa, East Africa south to Lake Malawi, and further north in Ethiopia, South Sudan and Eritrea. The large majority of birds wintering in eastern Africa are of the southwest Asian race, S

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Although the British climate is sub-optimal, compensatory factors include the ready availability of food, (particularly from bird tables), a shorter migration distance, and the avoidance of the Alps and the Sahara Desert. It was originally thought that most of these wintering birds come from Germany, and isotope analysis (which enables the wintering location to be determined) showed that the continental birds wintering in Britain tend to mate only among themselves, and do not usually interbreed with those wintering in the Mediterranean or western Africa
